name: Golf Lounge
about: The Golf Lounge in Lowell, Indiana, provides a realistic and private golf simulator experience. The facility is equipped with a simulator powered by Flightscope and E6 Software, offering a professional environment for both recreation and practice. Customers can access Titleist Performance Institute Medical Provider Swing Analysis services to improve their game in a relaxed atmosphere. The venue operates with secure online booking and emphasizes personalized attention from Level 3 certified professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Realistic simulator powered by Flightscope and E6 Software
Professional swing analysis from a Level 3 Titleist Performance Institute Medical Provider
Private and secure booking platform for personalized sessions
Relaxed atmosphere focused on improvement and enjoyment

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service; BYOB may be allowed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best personalized swing analysis experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, food is available on-site with kitchen facilities. Alcohol is not mentioned as a service, so BYOB may be allowed.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole session take?
faq.answer: The duration for an 18-hole session is not specified, but sessions can be booked online for flexible time slots.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Golf Lounge is family-friendly and suitable for juniors and youth golfers with its welcoming atmosphere and professional coaching.
